<svg width="256" height="256" viewBox="0 0 256 256" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
  <title>Bicycle</title>
  <desc>A simple vector illustration of a bicycle with a yellow seat on a #333333 background</desc>
  <rect width="256" height="256" fill="#FFEB3B"/>
  <!-- Bike Frame -->
  <path d="M 230.4 128.0 L 281.6 128.0 L 339.2 179.2 L 307.2 230.4 L 307.2 358.4 L 281.6 409.6 L 230.4 409.6 L 204.8 358.4 L 204.8 307.2 L 179.2 256.0 L 230.4 128.0" fill="#FFEB3B" stroke="#FFEB3B" stroke-width="256"/>
  <!-- Handlebar -->
  <path d="M 230.4 128.0 C 230.4 102.4 256.0 64.0 281.6 89.6" stroke="#FFEB3B" stroke-width="256" fill="#FFEB3B"/>
  <!-- Seat -->
  <path d="M 307.2 256.0 L 332.8 256.0 L 339.2 230.4 L 332.8 204.8 L 307.2 204.8 L 300.8 230.4 L 307.2 256.0" fill="#FFEB3B" stroke="#FFEB3B" stroke-width="256"/>
  <!-- Wheel (Left) -->
  <path d="M 128.0 332.8 C 179.2 332.8 179.2 384.0 128.0 384.0 C 76.8 384.0 76.8 332.8 128.0 332.8 Z" fill="#FFEB3B"/>
  <!-- Pedal -->
  <circle cx="100" cy="260" r="8" fill="#FFEB3B" />
  <circle cx="120" cy="260" r="8" fill="#FFEB3B" />
  <line x1="100" y1="260" x2="120" y2="260" stroke="#FFEB3B" stroke-width="256"/>
  <!-- Chain -->
  <path d="M 179.2 256.0 C 204.8 281.6 204.8 332.8 230.4 358.4" stroke="#FFEB3B" stroke-width="256" fill="#FFEB3B"/>
  <!-- Chainring -->
  <path d="M 230.4 320.0 C 230.4 345.6 204.8 345.6 204.8 320.0 L 204.8 320.0 L 230.4 320.0" stroke="#FFEB3B" stroke-width="256" fill="#FFEB3B"/>
  <!-- Seat Stay -->
  <path d="M 307.2 230.4 L 339.2 51.2" stroke="#FFEB3B" stroke-width="256"/>
  <!-- Front Fork -->
  <path d="M 281.6 89.6 L 76.8 179.2" stroke="#FFEB3B" stroke-width="256"/>
  <!-- Brake -->
  <path d="M 76.8 179.2 L 102.4 179.2" stroke="#FFEB3B" stroke-width="256"/>
</svg>
